expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度]是总尺寸，[板厚度]是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度]是背景板材料的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là số đo tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa itaas, ibaba, at gilid na tabla, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa likod na tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကာဘင်နက်အတွက်ဘုတ်ပြားအရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်ပိုင်း၊ အောက်ပိုင်းနှင့်ဘက်ဘုတ်၏ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပြားပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပါသည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាខ្នាតក្តាដើម្បីធ្វើទូ។ [ទ шир, [Height], [Depth] គឺជាខ្នាតសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាឡីបនៃសំភារៈតួក្តាខាងលើ, ចោកនិងក្តាចំហៀង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាឡីបនៃសំភារៈក្តាពីក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂອງໃຊ້ຄວາມຄິດໃໝ່. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດທັງຫມົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງຫນື່ງແຜ່ນເທິງ, ລຸ່ມແລະທາງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ຄືລວງຂອງສະເປັນຄວາມຄິດໄລ່ບັນຊີ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用のボードサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth]は全体の寸法、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、および側面ボードの材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背面ボードの材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수이고, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 판재의 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 판재의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les tailles de planche pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau supérieur, inférieur et latéral, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करें। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] टॉप, बॉटम और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой панелей, [BackBoardThick] - это толщина материала задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
